name: Telegram → OpenAI o Local HERCULES V11 — Plantilla pública

parameters.content:
## V11 — PLANTILLA PÚBLICA SIN CREDENCIALES

Este archivo está preparado para GitHub y no contiene:

- credenciales de Telegram;
- token del bot;
- clave de OpenAI;
- webhook interno;
- IP privada de HERCULES;
- ID, versión ni metadatos propios de la instalación n8n.

### Configuración después de importar

1. Asigna tu credencial de Telegram a todos los nodos Telegram.
2. En `Crear caricatura con OpenAI1`, sustituye:
   `REEMPLAZA_CON_TU_OPENAI_API_KEY`
3. Sustituye `HERCULES_IP` por la IP o DNS del equipo que ejecuta:
   - Ollama: puerto `11434`
   - ComfyUI: puerto `8188`
4. Activa únicamente un Telegram Trigger para el mismo bot.
5. Guarda y activa el workflow después de completar la configuración.

### Rama Local

- Ollama clasifica: persona, animal, objeto o mixto.
- `keep_alive: 0` descarga Ollama de la GPU.
- Espera 5 segundos antes de ejecutar ComfyUI.
- Cada categoría utiliza sus prompts positivo y negativo.
- `AJUSTES LOCAL` centraliza seed, steps, CFG, denoise, shift y fuerza del Lightning LoRA.

### Valores actuales

- timeout ComfyUI/Ollama: `3000000`
- espera ComfyUI: `600` comprobaciones
- espera tras Ollama: `5` segundos
- steps: `4`
- CFG: `1`
- denoise: `1`
- Lightning LoRA: `1`

parameters.text: Elige cómo quieres generar la caricatura:

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();

return items.map(item => ({
  ...item,
  json: {
    ...item.json,
    positive_base: `Create a clearly exaggerated hand-drawn caricature of the exact animal visible in the supplied reference image.

Preserve the exact animal species, natural anatomy, body structure, number of legs, paws, tail, ears, whiskers, fur pattern, markings, pose, head orientation and camera angle.

Keep the animal fully animal and anatomically natural in the body.

Important caricature rule:
make the result obviously a caricature, not a normal animal sketch and not a realistic wildlife drawing.

Concentrate the caricature exaggeration mainly in the face and head:
enlarge the eyes,
slightly enlarge the ears,
slightly enlarge the muzzle,
make the cheeks fuller,
make the facial expression more playful, amusing and charming,
make the head a bit larger relative to the body,
and exaggerate the most distinctive facial traits of the animal in a humorous way.

Keep the body natural and believable:
do not add human shoulders, human arms, human hands, human chest, human waist or human posture.
Do not make the animal bipedal.
Do not transform it into a mascot, furry character or humanoid animal.

The final result should feel like a professional animal caricature:
funny, expressive, charming and clearly exaggerated,
while still looking unmistakably like the same animal.

Style: monochrome blue ballpoint pen caricature drawing, lively loose hand-drawn strokes, visible sketch lines, rich hatching and crosshatching, on a plain warm cream background.

No notebook, sketchbook, spiral binding, punched holes, dotted paper, grid paper, page border, text, logo, signature or watermark.

make the head noticeably larger relative to the body
push the facial exaggeration further while keeping the body natural
make the expression more playful and amusing
emphasize the cheeks, muzzle and eyes more strongly
`
  }
}));

const items = $input.all();

return items.map(item => ({
  ...item,
  json: {
    ...item.json,
    positive_base: `Create a clearly exaggerated and humorous hand-drawn caricature of the exact object, artifact, machine, vehicle, suit or technical subject visible in the supplied reference image.

Preserve the object's identity, real construction, essential components, materials, silhouette, orientation and camera angle.

Make the result unmistakably a caricature, not a normal technical drawing, not a museum illustration and not a realistic object sketch.

Exaggerate the object's most distinctive real features in a playful way.

For vehicles, aircraft or machines:
enlarge the most characteristic components,
exaggerate wings, propellers, wheels, tail, cockpit, body shape or mechanical parts when appropriate,
use playful distorted proportions,
slightly bend or stretch the silhouette,
and create a dynamic humorous perspective.

For historical or technical artifacts:
emphasize the most recognizable parts,
make important components larger or more expressive,
and use controlled visual distortion while preserving recognizability.

Do not add a human face, eyes, mouth, teeth, hands or human body to the object.

Do not convert the object into a mascot or humanoid character.

The humor must come from exaggerated shape, scale, perspective and proportions, not from adding a human face.

Style: monochrome blue ballpoint pen caricature drawing, lively loose hand-drawn strokes, visible sketch construction lines, hatching and crosshatching on a plain warm cream background.

Composition: show the object prominently, closely framed and occupying most of the image. Avoid excessive empty space and avoid large pedestals, tables or display bases unless essential.

Background: plain warm cream background with subtle paper texture only. No notebook, sketchbook, spiral binding, punched holes, dotted paper, grid paper, page edge or border.

Do not include invented text, letters, numbers, labels, logos, signatures or watermarks.`
  }
}));

const items = $input.all();

return items.map(item => ({
  ...item,
  json: {
    ...item.json,
    positive_base: `Create one unified, clearly exaggerated and humorous hand-drawn caricature illustration based only on all the principal subjects visible in the supplied reference image.

Preserve the exact number and category of every principal subject. Do not add, remove, duplicate, replace or invent any person, animal or object.

Preserve the original composition, relative positions, scale relationships, camera angle, subject orientation and interaction between all visible subjects.

PERSONS:
Caricature every visible person using enlarged expressive eyes, exaggerated smiles, cheeks, eyebrows, ears and enlarged head proportions when appropriate.
Preserve identity, hairstyle, expression, clothing, pose, head orientation, gaze, accessories and visible hand placement.
Make people clearly humorous and caricatured, not realistic portraits.

ANIMALS:
Keep every animal completely animal.
Preserve species, breed, anatomy, number of legs, paws, tail, ears, muzzle, whiskers, fur or feather patterns, markings, pose and head orientation.
Exaggerate only genuine animal features such as the eyes, ears, muzzle, cheeks, whiskers, paws and tail.
Do not add human arms, hands, shoulders, clothing, posture, hairstyle, human teeth or human facial anatomy.

OBJECTS, VEHICLES AND TECHNICAL ELEMENTS:
Preserve the object's identity, construction, essential components, materials, silhouette, orientation and camera angle.
Make objects clearly caricatured by exaggerating their most distinctive real features, scale, perspective and proportions.
For vehicles or machines, exaggerate wings, propellers, wheels, tails, cockpits, body shapes or mechanical components when appropriate.
Do not add human faces, eyes, mouths, teeth, hands or bodies to objects.
The humor must come from shape, scale, perspective and proportion, not anthropomorphism.

The final result must look like one coherent caricature scene, not separate drawings pasted together.

Style: monochrome blue ballpoint pen caricature drawing, lively loose hand-drawn strokes, visible construction lines, hatching and crosshatching on a plain warm cream background.

Composition: keep all important subjects clearly visible and balanced. Avoid excessive empty space, oversized pedestals, unnecessary tables or invented background elements.

Background: plain warm cream background with subtle paper texture only. No notebook, sketchbook, spiral binding, punched holes, dotted paper, grid paper, page edge or border.

Render every visible detail only in blue ink and cream background.

Do not include invented text, letters, numbers, labels, captions, names, logos, signatures or watermarks.`
  }
}));

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: Create a highly exaggerated hand-drawn caricature illustration based only on the person or people visible in the supplied reference image. Use exactly the same number of people as in the reference image: do not add, remove, duplicate, replace or invent anyone. Preserve each person's recognizability, facial structure, hairstyle, expression, clothing, pose and visible hand placement. Exaggerate oversized expressive eyes, a very large cheerful smile and teeth, rounded or stretched cheeks, expressive eyebrows, enlarged head proportions, ears when appropriate and playful humorous facial proportions. Style: blue pencil sketch, graphite-style shading, visible rough construction lines, loose hand-drawn strokes, crosshatching, professional caricature artist quality, highly detailed facial drawing, whimsical sketchbook illustration, polished but intentionally hand-drawn. Composition: one unified illustration, closely framed upper-body portrait, balanced composition, no separate panels and no photographic elements. Background: clean cream-colored sketchbook paper with subtle paper texture and minimal background. Do not include the original photograph, realistic portraits, split screen, comparison panels, reference thumbnails, borders, labels, captions, names, logos, watermarks or text. Preserve recognizability despite the strong exaggeration.
